one_time_description: Recovery of bad debts previously allowanced from related parties (Tu Lidlini Petroleum LP and Dena Nezziddi Development Corporation), subsequently repaid in fiscal 2024
economic_notes: Three business entities accounted for by modified equity method: Dena Nezziddi Development Corporation, Tu Lidlini Petroleum Corporation (51%), Dena Nezziddi Limited Partnership. Investment income of $3,749,110 represents share of earnings from these entities. Nation is economically dependent on ISC and Yukon Government funding.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to absence of approved budget. Fiscal year end is March 31, 2022 but audit report is dated February 25, 2025 - extremely late filing. Nation is in Yukon Territory (YT). Three GBEs accounted for by modified equity method with total investment value of $9,814,271. Bad debt recovery of $940,421 from related parties is a significant one-time item inflating surplus. Heritage segment shows negative expenses of -$338,939 due to this recovery. Investment income of $3,749,110 represents share of earnings from First Nation business partnerships, primarily Dena Nezziddi Limited Partnership. No long-term debt reported. No schedule of remuneration provided. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $7,545,834 + Yukon Government $518,547 + Other government funding $514,117 = $8,578,498.
